Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for James Burns.

The sale was confirmed at $850,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
